recommendations.title: The Delta Force
recommendations.overview: A 707 aircraft jetliner, en route from Athens to Rome and then to New York City, is hijacked by Lebanese terrorists, who demand that the pilot take them to Beirut. What the terrorists don't realize is that an elite team of commandos have been called

recommendations.title: The Thing
recommendations.overview: A research team in Antarctica is hunted by a shape-shifting alien that assumes the appearance of its victims.

recommendations.title: Inmate Zero
recommendations.overview: There's a zombie outbreak after a medical trial in an international detention and medical facility on an isolated island. An ex US Special Forces/bodyguard woman inmate and a guard form a team.

recommendations.title: Predator
recommendations.overview: A team of elite commandos on a secret mission in a Central American jungle come to find themselves hunted by an extraterrestrial warrior.

recommendations.title: Zombie Flesh Eaters
recommendations.overview: After an abandoned boat sails into New York harbor with a zombie aboard, a reporter teams up with the daughter of the boat's missing owner to investigate the island where he was last seen conducting research—the site of an alleged zombie outbreak.

recommendations.title: Inception: The Cobol Job
recommendations.overview: Cobb, Arthur and Nash are enlisted by Cobol Engineering.

recommendations.title: 28 Days Later
recommendations.overview: Twenty-eight days after a killer virus was accidentally unleashed from a British research facility, a small group of London survivors are caught in a desperate struggle to protect themselves from the infected. Carried by animals and humans, the virus

recommendations.title: Re-Kill
recommendations.overview: Five years after a zombie outbreak, the men and women of R-Division hunt down and destroy the undead. When they see signs of a second outbreak, they fear humanity may not survive.

recommendations.title: Braindead
recommendations.overview: When a Sumatran rat-monkey bites Lionel Cosgrove's mother, she's transformed into a zombie and begins killing (and transforming) the entire town while Lionel races to keep things under control.

recommendations.title: Chill Factor
recommendations.overview: A store clerk and an ice cream truck driver are thrown together when a dying scientist entrusts them with a deadly chemical kept in ice. This chemical will kill every living thing once it melts. They have to take the chemical codenamed 'Elvis' to the
